mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inquiry ( member_id, category, writer, email, mail_receive, title, content, answer_status ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{category}, #{writer}, #{email}, #{mailReceive}, #{title}, #{content}, #{answerStatus} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, answer_content AS answerContent, answered_at AS answeredAt, member_id AS memberId, category, writer, email, mail_receive AS mailReceive, title, content, answer_status AS answerStatus, created_at AS createdAt FROM inquiry ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, answer_content AS answerContent, answered_at AS answeredAt, category, writer, email, mail_receive AS mailReceive, title, content, answer_status AS answerStatus, created_at AS createdAt FROM inquiry WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, answer_content AS answerContent, answered_at AS answeredAt, category, writer, email, mail_receive AS mailReceive, title, content, answer_status AS answerStatus, created_at AS createdAt FROM inquiry WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE inquiry SET answer_content = #{answerContent}, answer_status = '답변완료', answered_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
